description_long: This is a grand piano with a classic, elegant design, featuring a glossy black finish and a full-sized keyboard. The body is curved on one side and straight on the other, typical of grand pianos, with three sturdy legs supporting its weight. The keyboard consists of alternating white and black keys, arranged in a standard pattern, and the top lid is fully closed, giving the piano a sleek, monolithic appearance. No pedals or music stand are visible, and the piano's surface appears smooth and reflective. The overall build suggests a robust wooden frame, likely reinforced with metal components inside for string tension. This piano would be a striking centerpiece in an urban park, plaza, or public performance space.
description: A glossy black grand piano with a full keyboard, curved body, and closed lid, supported by three legs. The surface is smooth and reflective, with no visible pedals or music stand.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and the straight edge of the piano body.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the keyboard and the curved rear of the piano, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded back of the piano and the closed lid, with only one leg visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the keyboard from the other end and the piano's curved body, with two legs visible.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard grand piano keyboard with 88 keys, alternating white and black keys in a regular pattern, no missing or split keys.
